examples: Purpose To evaluate the clinical effects of early lamellar corneoscleral transplantation in the management of severe alkali burned eye.
The new blood vessels from the corneoscleral limbus reached and covered the burnt area in 5 ‾ 7 days, and gradually regressed after 20 days.
Objective To evaluate the relationship between the different position of corneoscleral limbus incision and vision or astigmatism in cataract surgery.
